== Players ==
=== Current squad ===
The following players were named in the squad for the [[2026 Diamond Jubilee International Football Tournament]] in June 2026.

''Caps and goals are correct as of 10 June 2026, after the match against [[Afghanistan national football team|Afghanistan]].''

{{nat fs g start}}
{{nat fs g player|no=1|pos=GK|name=[[Yousuf Butt]]|age={{Birth date and age|1989|10|18|df=y}}|caps=33|goals=0|club=[[Stallion Laguna F.C.|Stallion Laguna]]|clubnat=PHI}}
{{nat fs g player|no=20|pos=GK|name=[[Saqib Hanif]]|age={{Birth date and age|1994|04|23|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[New Radiant S.C.|New Radiant]]|clubnat=MDV}}
{{nat fs g player|no=22|pos=GK|name=[[Hassan Ali (footballer, born 2003)|Hassan Ali]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|2|23|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[WAPDA FC|WAPDA]]|clubnat=PAK}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=4|pos=DF|name=[[Abdullah Iqbal]]|other=[[Captain (association football)|Captain]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|07|27|df=y}}|caps=21|goals=0|club=[[Mjällby AIF|Mjällby]]|clubnat=SWE}}
{{nat fs g player|no=5|pos=DF|name=[[Easah Suliman]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|01|26|df=y}}|caps=11|goals=0|club=[[Sumgayit FK|Sumgayit]]|clubnat=AZE}}
{{nat fs g player|no=15|pos=DF|name=[[Abdullah Shah (footballer)|Abdullah Shah]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|02|06|df=y}}|caps=10|goals=0||club=[[Brothers Union]]|clubnat=BAN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=13|pos=DF|name=[[Mohib Ullah (footballer)|Mohib Ullah]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|05|23|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Paro FC]]|clubnat=BHU}}
{{nat fs g player|no=12|pos=DF|name=[[Haris Zeb]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|05|15|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[South Island United]]|clubnat=New Zealand}}
{{nat fs g player|no=3|pos=DF|name=[[Mohammad Fazal]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|05|29|df=y}}|caps=9|goals=0|club=[[Nordic United FC|Nordic United]]|clubnat=SWE}}
{{nat fs g player|no=6|pos=DF|name=[[Mamoon Moosa Khan]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|11|28|df=y}}|caps=12|goals=0|club=[[Paro FC]]|clubnat=BHU}}
{{nat fs g player|no=2|pos=DF|name=[[Ali Khan Niazi]]|age={{Birth date and age|2000|12|14|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[SA Gardens FC|SA Gardens]]|clubnat=PAK}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=21|pos=MF|name=[[Alamgir Ghazi]]|age={{Birth date and age|2001|05|09|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=0|club=[[Brothers Union]]|clubnat=BAN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=19|pos=MF|name=[[Hayyaan Khattak]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|10|06|df=y}}|clubnat=BAN|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[Brothers Union]]}}
{{nat fs g player|no=17|pos=MF|name=[[Ali Agha]]|age={{Birth date and age|1997|5|15|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=0|club=[[KRL FC|Khan Research Laboratories]]|clubnat=PAK}}
{{nat fs g player|no=8|pos=MF|name=[[Rahis Nabi]]|age={{Birth date and age|1999|04|16|df=y}}|caps=19|goals=1|club=[[Halesowen Town F.C. |Halesowen Town]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=7|pos=MF|name=[[Otis Khan]]|age={{Birth date and age|1995|9|5|df=y}}|caps=15|goals=0|club=[[Altrincham F.C.| Altrincham]]|clubnat=ENG}}
{{nat fs g player|no=10|pos=MF|name=[[Adil Nabi]]|age={{Birth date and age|1994|02|28|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Panachaiki F.C.|Panachaiki]]|clubnat=GRE}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs g player|no=11|pos=FW|name=[[Shayak Dost]]|age={{Birth date and age|2002|5|1|df=y}}|caps=20|goals=2|club=[[Brothers Union]]|clubnat=BAN}}
{{nat fs g player|no=18|pos=FW|name=[[Umar Nawaz (footballer)|Umar Nawaz]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|09|28|df=y}}|caps=4|goals=2|club=[[Wrexham A.F.C.| Wrexham A.F.C. Youth]]|clubnat=WAL}}

{{nat fs g player|no=23|pos=FW|name=[[Harun Hamid]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|11|10|df=y}}|caps=18|goals=4|club=[[Flota Świnoujście]]|clubnat=POL}}
{{nat fs g end}}

===Recent call-ups===
The following players have also been called up to the Pakistan squad within the last twelve months.
{{nat fs r start}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Usman Ali (footballer)|Usman Ali]]|age={{Birth date and age|2004|06|10|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[PWD Sports Club|PWD SC]]|clubnat=BAN|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=GK|name=[[Adam Khan (footballer)|Adam Khan]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|10|24|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Blackburn Rovers F.C. Under-23s and Academy|Blackburn Rovers U21]]|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 18 November 2025}}
{{Nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Muhammad Umar Hayat]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|09|22|df=y}}|caps=22|goals=1|club=[[Brothers Union]]|clubnat=BAN|latest=[[2026 Diamond Jubilee International Football Tournament]]<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Junaid Shah]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2003|03|23}}|caps=8|goals=0|club=[[SA Gardens FC|SA Gardens]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=[[2026 Diamond Jubilee International Football Tournament]]<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Abdul Rehman (footballer, born 2008)|Abdul Rehman]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2008|2|25}}|caps=2|goals=0|club=[[POPO FC]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=[[2026 Diamond Jubilee International Football Tournament]]<sup>PRE</sup>}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Waqar Baloch]]|age={{Birth date and age|1996|3|2|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Khan Research Laboratories FC|Khan Research Laboratories]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ahmed Salman (footballer)|Ahmed Salman]]|age={{Birth date and age|2006|08|24|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Shabab Al Ahli Club|Shabab Al Ahli]]|clubnat=UAE|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Sardar Wali]]|age={{Birth date and age|1998|11|28|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[WAPDA FC|WAPDA]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Kamil Marwat]]|age={{Birth date and age|2006|1|10|df=y}}|caps=0|goals=0|club=[[POPO FC]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Ans Amin]]| age={{Birth date and age|2006|4|15|df=y}} |caps=0|goals=0|club=[[SA Gardens FC|SA Gardens]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Rehman Manzoor]]|age={{Birth date and age|2003|8|3|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Pakistan Army FC|Pakistan Army]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=DF|name=[[Haseeb Khan]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2000|4|4}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Pakistan Air Force FC|Pakistan Air Force]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|AFG}}; 14 October 2025}}
{{nat fs break}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=MF|name=[[Tufail Shinwari]]|age={{birth date and age|df=y|2006|05|10}}|clubnat=PAK|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Karachi United]]|latest=[[2026 Diamond Jubilee International Football Tournament]]<sup>PRE</sup>}}

{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Muhammad Afzaal]]|age={{Birth date and age|1997|9|4|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[Pakistan Army FC|Pakistan Army]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Jevan Khan]]|age={{Birth date and age|2006|12|13|df=y}}|caps=1|goals=0|club=[[SA Gardens FC|SA Gardens]]|clubnat=PAK|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 31 March 2026}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Kaleemullah Khan (footballer)|Kaleemullah Khan]]|age={{Birth date and age|1992|09|20|df=y}}|caps=27|goals=4|club=[[Free agent]]|clubnat=| latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Ahmed Faraz Gulzari]]|age={{Birth date and age|2007|06|25|df=y}}|caps=3|goals=0|club=[[Melbourne Victory FC Youth|Melbourne Victory Youth]]|clubnat=AUS|latest=v. {{fb|SYR}}; 18 November 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=9|pos=FW|name=[[McKeal Abdullah]]|age={{Birth date and age|2005|07|07|df=y}}|caps=6|goals=0|club=[[Mansfield Town F.C.|Mansfield Town]] U21|clubnat=ENG|latest=v. {{fb|AFG}}; 14 October 2025}}
{{nat fs r player|no=|pos=FW|name=[[Adeel Younas]]|age={{Birth date and age|2006|03|23|df=y}}|caps=5|goals=0|club=[[Hoandedhdhoo FC]]|clubnat=MDV|latest=v. {{fb|AFG}}; 14 October 2025}}
{{Nat fs break}}
*<sup>PRE</sup> Preliminary squad / standby
*<sup>RET</sup> Retired from the national team
*<sup>INJ</sup> Player withdrew due to injury
*<sup>WD</sup> Player withdrew from squad due to non-injury issue
{{Nat fs end}}

== Player records ==
{{Main|Pakistan national football team records and statistics#Player records}}

{{Updated|7 June 2026}}<ref>{{cite web |title=Pakistan |url=https://www.national-football-teams.com/country/140/Pakistan.html |website=National Football Teams |access-date=20 June 2023 }}</ref>
:''Players in '''bold''' are still active with Pakistan.''

=== Most appearances ===
[[File:Haroon Yousaf during 1997 SAFF Gold Cup (cropped).jpg|thumb|190px|[[Haroon Yousaf]] is Pakistan's most capped player with 49 appearances.]]
{{See also|List of Pakistan international footballers}}
{| class="wikitable sortable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
!style="background-color: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF; width:30px"| Rank
!style="background-color: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF; width:175px" |Player

!style="background-color: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF; width:100px" |Period

|align="left"|[[Jaffar Khan]]

|2001–2013

|1
|1985–1995
|-
|4
| align="left" |[[Samar Ishaq]]
|44
|3
|2006–2013
|-
| rowspan="2" |5
| align="left" |[[Muhammad Essa]]
|40

|2001–2009

| align="left" |[[Muhammad Tariq Hussain]]
|40
|0
|1987–2003
|-
|7
| align="left" |[[Abdul Ghafoor (footballer)|Abdul Ghafoor]]
|35
|3
|1959–1974
|-
|8
| align="left" |'''[[Yousuf Butt]]'''
|33
|0
|2012–present
|-
|9
| align="left" |[[Sharafat Ali (footballer)|Sharafat Ali]]
|32
|12
|1984–1992
|-
|10
| align="left" |[[Tanveer Ahmed (footballer)|Tanveer Ahmed]]
|31
|3
|1999–2008
|}

: <small>'''NB''' ''Exact figures of players [[Pakistan national football team results (1950–1989)|before 1989]] are not yet known and yet to be researched. This absence of data is notable for old long-serving players before 1989 such as [[Muhammad Umer]], [[Qayyum Changezi]], [[Abid Hussain Ghazi]], [[Abdullah Rahi]] & [[Abdul Ghafoor (footballer)|Abdul Ghafoor]], who are likely to have accumulated between 30 and 40 caps. Additionally, player appearances are also missing in the [[2000 AFC Asian Cup qualification]], two of the 2002 friendly matches against [[Sri Lanka national football team|Sri Lanka]], and 2006 friendly against [[Palestine national football team|Palestine]] in the primary source and yet to be updated.''</small>

== Competitive record ==
{{Main|Pakistan national football team records and statistics#Competition records}}

=== AFC Challenge Cup ===
The [[AFC Challenge Cup]] was held every two years from 2006 through 2014.
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan=9 style="background: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF;" |[[AFC Challenge Cup|{{color|#FFFFFF|AFC Challenge Cup}}]] record
! style="width:1%;" rowspan=8|
! colspan=6 style="background: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF;|{{color|#FFFFFF|Qualification}} record

!Result
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D|Matches drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}

!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}

!{{Tooltip|W|Matches won}}
!{{Tooltip|D*|Matches drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Matches lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}

=== Asian Games ===
: ''Football at the Asian Games has been an under-23 tournament since 2002.''
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan=9 style="background: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF;" |[[Football at the Asian Games|{{color|#FFFFFF|Asian Games}}]] record
|-
!Year||Position||Pld||W||D||L||GF||GA
|-
|{{flagicon|IND}} [[Football at the 1951 Asian Games|1951]]|| colspan="7" |''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|PHI|1936}} [[Football at the 1954 Asian Games|1954]]||Round 1||2||1||0||1||7||4
|-
|{{flagicon|JPN|1870}} [[Football at the 1958 Asian Games|1958]]||Round 1||2||0||1||1||2||4
|-
|{{flagicon|IDN}} [[Football at the 1962 Asian Games|1962]]|| colspan="7" rowspan="3" |''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|THA}} [[Football at the 1966 Asian Games|1966]]
|-
|{{flagicon|THA}} [[Football at the 1970 Asian Games|1970]]
|-
|{{Flagicon|IRN}} [[Football at the 1974 Asian Games|1974]]||Round 1||3||1||0||2||6||13
|-
|{{flagicon|THA}} [[Football at the 1978 Asian Games|1978]]|| colspan="7" rowspan="2" |''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|IND}} [[Football at the 1982 Asian Games|1982]]
|-
|{{flagicon|KOR|1984}} [[Football at the 1986 Asian Games|1986]]||Round 1||4||0||0||4||2||15
|-
|{{flagicon|CHN}} [[Football at the 1990 Asian Games|1990]]||Round 1||3||0||0||3||1||16
|-
|{{flagicon|JPN|1870}} [[Football at the 1994 Asian Games|1994]]|| colspan="7" rowspan="2" |''Did not enter''
|-
|{{flagicon|THA}} [[Football at the 1998 Asian Games|1998]]
|-
|[[Football at the 2002 Asian Games|2002]] to present
|colspan=8|''See [[Pakistan national under-23 football team]]''
|- style="background: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF;|
||'''Total'''||'''5/13'''||'''14'''||'''2'''||'''1'''||'''11'''||'''18'''||'''52'''
|}

=== South Asian Games ===
:''Football at the South Asian Games has been an under-23 tournament since 2004.''
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan=9 style="background: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF;" |[[Football at the South Asian Games|{{color|#FFFFFF|South Asian Games}}]] record
|-
!Year
!Position
!{{Tooltip|Pld|Matches played}}
!{{Tooltip|W|Won}}
!{{Tooltip|D*|Drawn}}
!{{Tooltip|L|Lost}}
!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|-
|{{flagicon|Nepal}} [[Football at the 1984 South Asian Games|1984]]|| colspan="7" |''Did not enter''
|-style="background:LemonChiffon;"

|-bgcolor="#c96"

|- style="background:gold;"

|'''3'''

|'''1'''
|'''0'''
|'''5'''
|'''2'''

||'''Total'''||'''6/8'''||'''17'''||'''8'''||'''5'''||'''4'''||'''24'''||'''20'''
|}

=== RCD Cup ===
[[File:Pakistan_in_1974_RCD_Cup.jpg|thumb|Pakistan at the [[1974 RCD Cup]]]]
{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center;"
|-
! colspan=9 style="background: #01411C; color: #FFFFFF;" |[[RCD Cup|{{color|#FFFFFF|RCD Cup}}]] record
|-

!Position

!{{Tooltip|D*|Matches drawn}}

!{{Tooltip|GF|Goals for}}
!{{Tooltip|GA|Goals against}}
|- style="background:#cc9966;"
|{{flagicon|Iran|1964}} [[1965 RCD Cup|1965]]||'''Third place'''||2||0||0||2||2||7

|}
